title: Cinematography & Direction
description: Short films, music videos, brand films, events — scripted, shot, and edited with cinematic intent. Every project is treated with the same level of precision and storytelling.

title: Photography & Graphic Design
description: Posters, banners, photo editing, thumbnails, photo manipulation and retouching. Visual identity built with intention.

title: Editing & Post Production
description: Premiere Pro & DaVinci Resolve. Cuts that breathe, pacing that feels natural. Every edit is a narrative choice.

title: Color Grading & Motion Graphics
description: Color that tells the story — from cinematic LUTs to data-driven brand palettes. Motion graphics that elevate the final film.

title: Sound Design & Audio Production
description: Foley, scoring, mixing and mastering — sound is 50% of the film. I don't leave it to chance.

title: Cinematic Weddings & Event Films
description: Weddings, corporate events, live concerts, stage productions — captured beautifully, told honestly. Cinematic storytelling for life's biggest moments.

title: Web Development
description: Full-stack MERN engineer. React, Node, PostgreSQL, TypeScript — production-grade web applications built to scale.

title: App Development
description: Cross-platform mobile apps with React Native. Native navigation, API integration, and polished user experiences.

title: Digital & Social Media Marketing
description: End-to-end digital brand promotion, campaign ideation, content creation, and community engagement. Organic reach growth and conversion-focused content strategy.
